Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2026

PatternsShift is committed to protecting your personal information.

What we collect

  • Email address — when you subscribe or purchase
  • Purchase information — processed securely through Gumroad
  • Anonymised usage data — only if you accept cookies

How we use your data

  • To send content updates and new program announcements
  • To deliver purchased products
  • We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing

Your rights

Unsubscribe anytime via the link in any email. To request data deletion: hello@patternsshift.com

This site operates from the EU and complies with GDPR.

Terms of Use

Last updated: April 2026

Educational purpose

All PatternsShift programs are educational resources — not a substitute for professional psychological treatment.

Digital products

  • All sales are final. No refunds once a file has been downloaded.
  • Purchased materials are for personal use only.

Intellectual property

All content is the intellectual property of Hanna Pashnik / PatternsShift and may not be reproduced without permission.

Contact: hello@patternsshift.com

Self-Sabotage Guide

Understand the hidden mechanisms behind self-sabotage — why you repeat patterns that hurt you, and what psychological structures keep them in place. CBT and ACT frameworks, written for real people.

Self-Sabotage Recovery

A 21-day structured practice to identify, interrupt, and rewire self-sabotaging patterns. Daily exercises grounded in CBT, ACT, and Jungian shadow work — built for people ready to stop the cycle.

PatternsShift
on Substack

Deep reads on behavioral patterns, archetypes, and the psychology of self-sabotage — written for people who want to actually understand what's happening, not just feel better for a moment.

Free subscribers get full articles and exercises. Paid subscribers get access to the community — where we discuss the patterns, share what's working, and go deeper together.

About

Understanding
the mechanics.

I'm Hanna Pashnik — psychology content creator and educator. I develop digital infoproducts (guides, workbooks), write long-form articles on Substack, and design coaching games — on behavioral patterns, burnout, self-sabotage, and the psychology of how we get in our own way.

My background includes a medical degree (physician, Eastern Europe), an MBA in Psychology and Consulting (Czech Republic), coaching certification, and 17 years as a physician-psychotherapist in clinical practice. That experience informs everything I create — but what I make now is educational, not clinical.

Medical degree (physician) · Eastern Europe
MBA in Psychology and Consulting · Czech Republic
Coaching Certification · European Coaching Federation
17 years as physician-psychotherapist · clinical practice
CBT · ACT · Jungian Psychology
"All programs, articles, and games on this site are educational resources only. They are not therapy, not medical advice, and not a substitute for professional psychological care."
If you're dealing with something serious, please reach out to a qualified specialist. For everyone else — this is where the work of understanding your patterns begins.
